g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a developer push code in a DevOps workflow?')
sendPrompt('What happens when code is pushed to a GitHub repository in DevOps?')
sendPrompt('How do GitHub Actions trigger a CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What are unit tests in a CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does Docker build a container image in a CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is a container registry and why push images to it?')
sendPrompt('What does SonarQube check in a DevSecOps pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does Snyk scan for in DevSecOps?')
sendPrompt('What does Trivy scan in a container image?')
sendPrompt('What is Gitleaks and why use it in CI?')
sendPrompt('How does ArgoCD implement GitOps continuous delivery?')
sendPrompt('What does Helm do when deploying to Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between EKS and AKS for Kubernetes deployment?')
sendPrompt('How do you manage dev staging and production environments in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('How does Prometheus collect metrics from Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('What dashboards does Grafana provide for DevOps monitoring?')
sendPrompt('How does the ELK stack work for log aggregation?')
sendPrompt('How do alerts get triggered when Prometheus detects an anomaly?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform manage cloud infrastructure as code?')
sendPrompt('How does Ansible configure servers in a DevOps workflow?')
sendPrompt('How do multi-cloud strategies work across AWS Azure and OCI?')
